violations.description: EMPLOYEE HYGIENE (5 pts): Employee noted donning gloves while hands were contaminated and did not wash hands before starting work.
HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): The hand washing lavatory noted with no consistent water provided.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Observed equipment exteriors with heavy debris build up.
TEMPERATURE MEASURING DEVICES (1 pts): An accurate food thermometer not being utilized to check food temperatures.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Microwave interior and reachin cooler interiors not properly maintained.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Metal shelves microwave exterior and other cooking equipment exteriors noted in need of cleaning.
LIGHTING (1 pts): The lights noted not shielded in mobile.
VENTILATION HOOD SYSTEM (1 pts): Hood and filters noted not clean.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors walls and ceiling throughout food truck noted in need of cleaning.
